name: design-critique
description: Evaluate an existing UI against Apple HIG, Nielsen's 10 heuristics, Gestalt principles, and WCAG 2.2 AA — producing a prioritized improvement plan with severity-rated findings and before/after recommendations.

interface.shortDescription: Evaluate an existing UI against Apple HIG, Nielsen's heuristics, Gestalt, and WCAG 2.2 AA — producing a prioritized improvement plan.
interface.longDescription: Evaluate an existing UI against Apple HIG (Clarity, Deference, Depth), Nielsen's 10 usability heuristics, Gestalt principles, and WCAG 2.2 AA. Identifies concrete violations — solid backgrounds that break depth, low-contrast text, broken visual hierarchy, missing interactive states, off-grid spacing — and prescribes specific before/after fixes with severity ratings (P1–P4) and effort estimates. Preserves the existing brand/theme while improving the design. Asks the user to decide on any recommendation that conflicts with intentional brand choices.
defaultPrompt: Critique the design of this project.
